subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the fragrances of God! The Beauty of the Most Glorious One hath shone forth from the Sinai of Revelation, the Dawning-place of Light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات الله قد تجلی جمال الله الابهی من سیناء الظهور مشرق النور
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant
